title: Overclocking
discoveryHint: Build higher-tier machines to learn about overclocking.

sections.text: When a machine's tier is higher than a recipe requires, it overclocks automatically. Each overclock gives 2x speed but 4x power consumption, meaning the total energy cost doubles per overclock.
Machines have a button to set maximum overclock voltage. Set it to X to disable overclocking. For automated setups, overclock as little as possible to save energy.
Some machines have perfect overclocking where speed quadruples instead of doubling, such as the Electric Blast Furnace under certain temperature conditions.
